src/main/java/com/javatechie/dto/Course..general_idea: Add the @Builder annotation to enable the Builder design pattern for the Course DTO.
src/main/java/com/javatechie/dto/Course..human_impl: Added 'import lombok.Builder;' and '@Builder' annotation to the class.

src/main/java/com/javatechie/service/Cou.general_idea: Replace empty list initialization with a pre-populated list of Course objects using List.of factory method.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven project property to target Java 21 instead of Java 17.

README.md.general_idea: Updated the pre-requisites list to specify Java 21 and add LocalStack-specific tools like Docker and AWS Local.
README.md.human_impl: Added Java21, Docker, Docker Compose, AWS Local, and SAM Local to the list; removed Gradle/Maven.

README.md.general_idea: Added a new section detailing how to build, deploy, and run the application using LocalStack via Docker Compose and samlocal.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Deploying and running on LocalStack' section with docker compose and samlocal commands.

README.md.general_idea: Replaced the use of Python's json.tool for formatting JSON output in curl examples with jq.
README.md.human_impl: Changed `| python -m json.tool` to `| jq` in curl commands.

README.md.general_idea: Removed the old instructions for generating the project from an archetype and building with standard SAM CLI.
README.md.human_impl: Deleted the 'Building the project' section containing mvn archetype:generate and sam build commands.

template.yml.general_idea: Add a CloudFormation output to expose the LocalStack endpoint URL for local development and testing.
template.yml.human_impl: Added 'LocalStackLambdaApiPing' output with Value using 'localhost.localstack.cloud:4566' domain.

template.yml.general_idea: Rename the existing AWS Cloud output to distinguish it from the new LocalStack output.
template.yml.human_impl: Renamed 'SpringBootLambdaApi' to 'CloudLambdaApi' and updated its Export Name.
